postStartCommand: sudo service mysql start && sudo mysql -u root -e "INSERT IGNORE INTO rbac_db.roles (id,name) VALUES (1,'admin'),(2,'editor'),(3,'viewer'); INSERT IGNORE INTO rbac_db.permissions (id,name,resource,action) VALUES (1,'user:view','users','view'),(2,'user:create','users','create'),(3,'user:edit','users','edit'),(4,'user:delete','users','delete'); INSERT IGNORE INTO rbac_db.users (id,username,password,role_id) VALUES (1,'admin','admin123',1); INSERT IGNORE INTO rbac_db.role_permissions VALUES (1,1),(1,2),(1,3),(1,4),(2,1),(2,2),(3,1);"
